purpose: Defines metadata-level visual QA gates for generated weapon/class source and pixel sprite files.
rules: Metadata QA only runs on files that exist in the planned output manifest.
Missing files remain waiting_file until generated art is dropped into the planned path.
Existing files must be PNG, match the 1254x1254 source canvas, and use RGBA color type for transparency.
Passing metadata QA does not approve the image visually; it only makes the file ready for visual anchor review.

outputTypeRules.notes: Source files should preserve high-detail source-body lighting and anatomy before pixel conversion.
Pixel files should preserve source silhouette and anchor positions by normalized coordinates.
